name: Oryxmas Ornament: Exposed
description: Notes Obtained from the Oryxmas Bonus Program. It’s a component in creating the ST Ornaments of Unity.
effects: On Taking Damage: 10% chance to spawn an Oryxmas Tree that inflicts Exposed to surrounding enemies for 4 seconds and deals 50 damage every 0.2 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds
